title: 这条 prompt 详细描述了一个高端赛车主题计时码表的广告图片，适合用于中文市场中的高端手表品牌推广，特别是在强调速度与奢华结合的营销场景中。
image_alt: 这条 prompt 详细描述了一个高端赛车主题计时码表的广告图片，适合用于中文市场中的高端手表品牌推广，特别是在强调速度与奢华结合的营销场景中。
prompt_original: A dramatic luxury product advertising image for a motorsport-inspired chronograph wristwatch in a dark studio. Center-left foreground, show a single stainless steel chronograph watch standing upright at a slight three-quarter angle, with a black dial, two red-accent subdials, slim silver hour markers, a tachymeter bezel, and visible crown and pushers on the right side. The watch has a black leather strap with bold red stitching along both edges and a sporty premium finish. To the right of the watch, place one black square presentation box slightly behind it, textured like leather, with red stitching around the lid and a silver embossed eye-shaped logo above the text "NESS STUDIO" and smaller red text "TRACK SURFACE." At the top center of the composition, add the same silver eye logo with the words "NESS STUDIO" and smaller "BY NICOLAS." Across the background, place one oversized blurred word, {argument name="headline text" default="PRECISION"}, in large gray capital letters spanning nearly the full width. The scene is set against a deep black background with cinematic red and white horizontal light streaks crossing behind the products from left to right, suggesting speed and racetrack energy. Use a glossy wet ground plane with reflective texture, catching red highlights and mirrorlike reflections beneath the watch and box. At the bottom center, add the text "CHRONOGRAPH SERIES" in clean white spaced capitals with thin red horizontal lines extending on both sides, and below it smaller red capitals reading {argument name="tagline text" default="ALSACE MADE"}. Color palette: black, charcoal gray, silver steel, vivid racing red, and a touch of white. Lighting should be high-contrast and premium, with crisp specular highlights on the metal case, subtle soft fill on the box, and moody shadows. Overall style: ultra-polished commercial product photography, luxury watch campaign, sharp focus on the products, sleek branding, high-end automotive aesthetic.
prompt_zh: 一张戏剧性的豪华产品广告图片，展示一款灵感来源于赛车的计时码表腕表，在一个黑暗的工作室中。前景左侧中央，展示一只不锈钢计时码表以轻微的三分之二角度直立放置，黑色表盘，两个带有红色点缀的小表盘，细长的银色时标，测速仪表圈，以及右侧可见的表冠和按钮。手表配有黑色皮革表带，边缘有大胆的红色缝线，运动且高端的质感。在手表右侧稍微靠后的位置，放置一个黑色方形展示盒，纹理类似皮革，盖子周围有红色缝线，并在“NESS STUDIO”文字上方有一个银色浮雕眼形标志，下方有较小的红色文字“TRACK SURFACE”。在构图的顶部中央，添加相同的银色眼形标志，上面有“NESS STUDIO”和较小的“BY NICOLAS”字样。背景中，放置一个放大的模糊单词{argument name="headline text" default="PRECISION"}，用大写的灰色字母几乎覆盖整个宽度。场景设置在一个深黑色背景上，从左到右穿过产品的背后有一条水平的红白光带，暗示速度和赛道能量。使用具有反射质感的光滑湿润地面平面，捕捉红色高光并在手表和盒子下方形成镜面反射。在底部中央，添加“CHRONOGRAPH SERIES”字样，用干净的白色间距大写字母，两侧延伸出细长的红色横线，下方是较小的红色大写字母{argument name="tagline text" default="ALSACE MADE"}。色彩调色板：黑色、炭灰色、银钢色、鲜艳的赛车红和一点白色。照明应为高对比度和高端，金属表壳上有清晰的高光，展示盒上有微妙的柔和填充，以及情绪化的阴影。整体风格：超精致的商业产品摄影，奢侈手表广告活动，重点突出产品，简洁的品牌形象，高端汽车美学。
